name: Domain Naming & Glossary Extractor
short_description: Infers a project-specific crypto domain glossary by extracting identifier names, class/enum hierarchies, and documentation comments across all modules, detecting semantic inconsistencies such as Token vs Coin disambiguation and surfacing term-to-code mappings for agent reasoning.
tech_stack: SwiftSyntax — extracts enum case names, class/struct/protocol names, KDoc/DocC comment text, property names within domain model types
tree-sitter (Swift + Kotlin grammars) — fast token-level identifier extraction for cross-module name frequency analysis
ast-grep — structural patterns for class hierarchies (class Coin : Asset, sealed class Token : BlockchainAsset)
semgrep — inconsistent naming patterns: files using 'Coin' in one module vs 'Token' in another; cross-module name collision
LLM (GPT-4o / Claude-3.5) — required for: semantic disambiguation (auth token vs blockchain token), glossary description generation, cluster labeling
sentence-transformers / text-embedding-3-small — embed identifier names + surrounding code context for semantic clustering
KDoc / DocC parser — extracts prose descriptions from /// and /** */ comments
Graphiti entity extraction pipeline — custom entity_types schema defining CryptoDomainTerm as EntityNode type
entity_model: Produces :DomainTerm nodes (term, canonical_form, category∈{asset-type|transaction-concept|network-concept|ui-label|protocol-concept|technical-identifier}, definition_source∈{code-comment|inferred|external-glossary}, confidence_pct, first_seen_file). :SYNONYM_OF edge between :DomainTerm nodes (weight=semantic_similarity_score). :USED_AS edge from :DomainTerm to :Symbol. :INCONSISTENCY nodes (term_a, term_b, module_a, module_b, inconsistency_kind). :GlossaryCluster nodes group related domain terms via CommunityNode. Faceted axes: semantic-kind=DomainKnowledge, domain-concept=CryptoGlossary, capability=:Explains.
storage_format: hybrid — :DomainTerm nodes in graph; additionally .knowledge/domain-glossary.md markdown snapshot for human review and LLM context injection. Markdown versioned in git alongside code.

prior_art.name: Global Crypto Classification Standard (21Shares, Sep 2024)
prior_art.description: Industry standard; Token = asset on existing chain, Coin = native asset of own chain.

prior_art.name: Knowledge Graph Based Repository-Level Code Generation (arXiv 2505.14394)
prior_art.description: Uses domain-concept nodes extracted from code to guide LLM code generation.

prior_art.name: Graphiti temporal entity extraction
prior_art.description: Graphiti's LLM-based entity extraction pipeline with Pydantic model-defined entity types. entity_types parameter accepts custom schemas.

prior_art.name: SemanticForge (arXiv 2511.07584)
prior_art.description: Repository-level code generation through semantic knowledge graphs; explicitly constructs domain-term subgraph.

prior_art.name: Unstoppable Wallet iOS
prior_art.description: Target codebase reference: uses Coin, Token, TransactionRecord, BlockchainType as domain identifiers.

prior_art.name: ENRE
prior_art.description: ENtity Relationship Extractor; incremental update support (Nov 2024).

consumer_query_patterns.label: What does 'Token' mean vs 'Coin'?
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (t1:DomainTerm {term:'Token'}), (t2:DomainTerm {term:'Coin'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (t1)-[r:SYNONYM_OF]-(t2) RETURN t1.definition_source, t1.category, t2.definition_source, t2.category, r.weight

consumer_query_patterns.label: Find all naming inconsistencies between modules
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (inc:Inconsistency)-[:AFFECTS]->(m1:Module), (inc)-[:AFFECTS]->(m2:Module) WHERE m1 <> m2 RETURN inc.term_a, inc.term_b, m1.name, m2.name, inc.inconsistency_kind

consumer_query_patterns.label: Which symbols use the term 'address' and in what contexts?
consumer_query_patterns.cypher: MATCH (dt:DomainTerm {term:'address'})-[:USED_AS]->(s:Symbol) RETURN s.name, s.kind, s.file, dt.category LIMIT 30

consumer_query_patterns.label: Full glossary cluster for blockchain asset types

graphiti_episode_type: EntityNode — :DomainTerm nodes are long-lived entities with stable canonical_form IDs. :SYNONYM_OF edges carry confidence_pct. :INCONSISTENCY nodes are EpisodicNode. CommunityNode clusters related domain terms.
ingest_perf_est: [uncertain] Full ingest: 20–45 min on 350K LOC due to LLM calls. Incremental: ~5–15 min. Highly uncertain — LLM latency dominates.
failure_modes: LLM hallucination: definition generation for ambiguous terms may produce plausible but incorrect definitions
Homonym confusion: 'token' has three distinct meanings (blockchain asset, auth, NLP)
Embedding clustering instability across model versions
Sparse comments: low KDoc/DocC coverage drops confidence_pct
Cross-language term drift: Swift CoinRecord vs Kotlin CoinEntity — requires multilingual embedding model
Dynamic identifiers invisible to static AST extraction
External glossary divergence from project-specific usage
open_questions: Share :DomainTerm with extractor #40 (Crypto Domain Model) or keep separate subgraph?
Authority when graph and markdown diverge after human edit — editable or read-only?
How to prevent Graphiti entity deduplication merging :DomainTerm with unrelated entities sharing same term string?
Incremental updates: full cluster re-evaluation cost for high-centrality terms may approach full-ingest cost
Should :INCONSISTENCY trigger automated PR comments or stay read-only?
adversarial_resistance: low — identifier names are primary signal; renaming to consistent (even wrong) terms eliminates inconsistency nodes while hiding semantic ambiguity.
